prompt_text:
### Demographics: 70-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Major Depressive Disorder
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 71.9 kg; Height 166.3 cm; BMI 26.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 121/63 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.4%; 9 months ago 7.2%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 170mg/dL; 9 months ago 147mg/dL; 6 months ago 168mg/dL; 3 months ago 182mg/dL; current 140mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 73.1kg; 9 months ago 70.1kg; 6 months ago 71.1kg; 3 months ago 70.2kg; current 71.9kg), Height (12 months ago 166.3cm; 9 months ago 166.3cm; 6 months ago 166.3cm; 3 months ago 166.3cm; current 166.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 26.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 125mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 122mmHg; 3 months ago 122mmHg; current 121mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 62mmHg; 9 months ago 61mmHg; 6 months ago 62mmHg; 3 months ago 63mmHg; current 63mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 87U/L; 9 months ago 79U/L; 6 months ago 79U/L; 3 months ago 79U/L; current 86U/L), AST (12 months ago 46U/L; 9 months ago 54U/L; 6 months ago 46U/L; 3 months ago 55U/L; current 52U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 81mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 81mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 79mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 82mL/min/1.73m²; current 79mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 15mg/g; 9 months ago 17mg/g; 6 months ago 17mg/g; 3 months ago 13mg/g; current 14mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 71mg/dL; 6 months ago 76mg/dL; 3 months ago 71mg/dL; current 74mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 40mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 168mg/dL; 9 months ago 166mg/dL; 6 months ago 186mg/dL; 3 months ago 186mg/dL; current 175mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.2g/dL; 6 months ago 13.9g/dL; 3 months ago 13.2g/dL; current 13.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
